sql_array: CREATE TABLE bpel_instances (id INT PRIMARY KEY, completion_date DATETIME NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO bpel_instances (id, completion_date) VALUES (1, STRINGDATE('2003-12-31'));
INSERT INTO bpel_instances (id, completion_date) VALUES (2, STRINGDATE('2004-01-05'));
INSERT INTO bpel_instances (id, completion_date) VALUES (3, STRINGDATE('2004-01-15'));
INSERT INTO bpel_instances (id, completion_date) VALUES (4, STRINGDATE('2004-01-20'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances WHERE completion_date < STRINGDATE('2004-01-10');
SELECT id, completion_date FROM bpel_instances WHERE completion_date < STRINGDATE('2004-01-10') ORDER BY ID % 2;
SELECT SUM((id % 2)) AS even_count FROM bpel_instances GROUP BY (id % 2) HAVING even_count > 0;
SELECT id, (completion_date < STRINGDATE('2004-01-10')) AS is_old FROM bpel_instances;
SELECT id, BPEL.BPEL.purge_instance(STRINGDATE('2004-01-15')) % (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances) AS purge_modulus FROM bpel_instances;
SELECT MAX(id), STRINGDATE('2004-01-01') AS boundary_date FROM bpel_instances WHERE completion_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT completion_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances WHERE completion_date < STRINGDATE('2004-01-10')) AS old_instance_count FROM bpel_instances WHERE completion_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_instances HAVING SUM(id) % NULL IS NULL;
